DescribeJob.resourcePoolId: Unique identifier of the resource pool; pass the resource pool ID (e.g., cce-1uji3ib5) for self-managed pools, or `aihc-serverless` for managed pools
DescribeJob.queueID: Queue to which the training job belongs; pass the queue name for general resource pools, or the queue ID for managed resource pools
DescribeJob.needDetail: Whether to return detailed information; when set to `true`, the response will include the Pod list and historical Pod list
